executiveSummary: OryMart is envisioned as a next-generation, enterprise-grade eCommerce platform designed to deliver an unparalleled, frictionless shopping experience. By leveraging cutting-edge web technologies, OryMart will provide a highly responsive, immersive interface that seamlessly guides users from product discovery to secure checkout. The platform is architected to support massive scale, handling high-volume traffic and complex product catalogs with sub-second latency. This initiative aims to redefine digital retail by integrating advanced user authentication, dynamic product management, real-time inventory tracking, and sophisticated order orchestration. The system will empower administrators with deep analytics and operational control while offering end-users personalized recommendations, intuitive cart management, and transparent order tracking. Ultimately, OryMart will serve as the flagship digital storefront, driving revenue growth, customer retention, and operational excellence through a robust, scalable, and secure full-stack architecture.

userStories.story: As an unregistered user, I want to view an immersive homepage with dynamic product carousels and promotional banners so that I can discover new and trending items.  I need to see high-quality visuals and clear calls to action.  The experience should be fast and engaging.  I want to feel confident in the brand immediately.  This will encourage me to explore further.  I expect the layout to adapt perfectly to my device.  The navigation should be intuitive and accessible.  I want to see personalized recommendations if I return.  The search bar should be prominently displayed.  I need to easily find the login or registration area.  The footer should contain essential links and trust signals.  I want to see social proof like customer reviews or ratings.  The overall design should be modern and clean.  I expect the site to load almost instantly.  I want to be able to easily share products I like.  The promotional banners should be relevant and timely.  I need to clearly understand the value proposition of OryMart.  The homepage should be a gateway to a seamless shopping journey.  I want to be inspired by the product curation.
